privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic time-billing task using LibreOffice Calc (.ods format). The task has 8 work entries (NOT 9 as README claims) across 3 clients: Acme Corp ($75/hr), TechStart Inc ($85/hr), and LocalBiz LLC ($65/hr). Verified financial totals: Acme Corp subtotal $637.50 (3 entries × rates), TechStart Inc subtotal $680.00 (3 entries), LocalBiz LLC subtotal $276.25 (2 entries), Grand Total $1,593.75. Data is entirely synthetic, created by Python ODF library. Duration formula: =(E-D)*24 for time differences. Task requires calculating missing durations from start/end times, computing billable amounts (duration × rate), creating client subtotals, and calculating grand total using formulas (not hardcoded values). Timeout: 180 seconds, max steps: 15, difficulty: easy. Key contradiction: README states '9 work entries' but actual data contains 8 work entries.
